commits: fix(extraction): add 'statement of operations' income-section pattern + annual report URL overrides
history.notes: Two-pronged fix: (1) data/ticker.json — replaced the quarterly SAND.ST override URL with the 2024 annual report; added direct Cision/CDN PDF URLs for LUMI, SWED-A, BEIJ-B, VOLCAR-B (media-downloads), and expanded SINCH from bare string to full object with PDF URL. (2) src/extraction/field-extractor.ts — added 'consolidated statements? of operations' and 'statements? of operations and comprehensive income' to INCOME_STATEMENT_PATTERNS, enabling EBIT extraction from North-American-format annual reports (Lundin Mining pattern). All 87 tests pass; no rescrape this iteration (rescrape needed to measure partialAfter).
